narrative:
Greenfield Twp (precinct in Gallia County) has 267 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 13.5 percentage points.
